name: benchling-integration
tagline: Benchling Python SDK/REST API skill for lab data: registry entities, inventory, ELN, workflows, EventBridge events, Data Warehouse.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped SDK reference skill. Credential handling is explicit and scoped ('Read only the named keys you need — never dump or iterate over the full environment'; 'Route network calls exclusively to your tenant URL'), no obfuscation or hidden instructions found. Minor gaps: no negative-use guidance, no confirmation/idempotency caution around bulk arc

highlights.summary: Shows bulk mutation patterns (e.g. 'Update all pending tasks for a workflow', lines 482-500; container.archive() listed as a key op, line 168) without any confirmation step or dry-run caution before i
No explicit 'do not use when' / negative-trigger guidance anywhere in the file.
No explicit statement of expected return shapes/success criteria beyond what's implicit in code examples (e.g. created objects, generator pagination); no dedicated output-contract section.
